params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Nest. Focus tightly on: sofa, coffee table, area rug, low-profile 3-seater sofa — pale oat linen upholstery (#EDE6DE), low wooden plinth base in light oak (#D2BFA3), single long seat cushion, no visible legs, textured wool rug — warm oatmeal (#EDE6DE) with subtle charcoal linear weave (#2F3230), 8x10ft, low pile, low organic coffee table — organic-shaped low coffee table, solid walnut stained warm brown (#8A6E52), matte finish, curved edges, tall potted fiddle-leaf fig — matte terra-cotta pot in muted green (#6A736A), height ~5ft, round light-oak dining table — round 48in diameter, light oak veneer tabletop (#D2BFA3), slim tapered legs, matte finish, oversized woven pendant — dome-shaped woven seagrass pendant, warm tan (#B58E61), diameter 28in, interior white diffuser, bookshelf. Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A calm, family-friendly Japandi interior that balances warm neutrals, low-profile furniture, and layered natural textures. Prioritize a cozy work corner in the bedroom while keeping sightlines clean across the open-plan living, dining, and kitchen. Light is soft and directional from windows; materials focus on light oak, warm walnut accents, hand-glazed ceramics, woven pendants, and tactile textiles. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
